title: Li Auto Q1 2026 Earnings Release Scheduled for May 28
text: Li Auto has scheduled its Q1 2026 earnings release for May 28, 2026. The company announced it would release unaudited first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 28, 2026. The announcement comes after Li Auto delivered 41,053 vehicles in March 2026, representing a 12% year-over-year increase and a substantial 55% jump from February. First-quarter deliveries totaled 95,142 units. This timing is significant as investors await clarity on the company's performance following recent strategic announcements including the L9 Livis launch and autonomous driving technology updates. The earnings call will provide management commentary on product mix, margins, competitive position, and outlook for the remainder of 2026. Key investor focus areas will be gross margin trends, breakdown of EREV vs. BEV deliveries, and management guidance on full-year expectations. The May 28 earnings date comes at a critical juncture as the company executes its strategic shift toward pure electric vehicles and premium positioning.
